title: 1. Ground Zero
body: Welcome to the Permaculture 4 Squares simulator. Your first task is to repair this soil. Select the Rotovator tool, prepare a few tiles, and plant some fast-growing White Clover to fix nitrogen.

title: 2. Catch and Store
body: Look at your Almanac forecast (Top Right). Tomorrow brings Rain, but it is followed by a two-day Drought. Select 'Dig Swale' and dig a trench across your farm. Tomorrow, it will catch the rain.

title: 3. Passive Irrigation
body: The Drought is here! But look at your Swale. Because it caught yesterday's rain, it is now slowly bleeding moisture into the adjacent tiles. Your plants survive without you lifting a Watering Can.

title: 4. The GVCS Grid
body: You have mastered water; now master energy. It is raining today. Open your Build menu and construct a Water Butt next to your farmhouse to catch the run-off. Then, build a Solar Panel to catch tomorrow's sun.

title: 5. Power Tools
body: Your Solar Panel absorbed yesterday's clear skies, filling your battery. You can now equip the E-Tiller. It uses electrical charge instead of your physical stamina, allowing you to prepare massive areas instantly.

title: 6. Vertical Stacking
body: You are ready. Try planting an Apple Tree, and plant Comfrey on the exact same tile. They occupy different vertical layers (Canopy and Groundcover) and will share nutrients. Good luck!
